parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO uploads (id, nom_fichier, fichier_path, pdf_url, traite, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid()::text,
  '{{ $('Prepare File').first().json.filename }}',
  '{{ $('Prepare File').first().json.filepath || '' }}',
  '{{ 'http://192.168.1.70:5678/webhook/serve-upload?f=' + $('Prepare File').first().json.filename }}',
  false,
  NOW(), NOW()
)
RETURNING *
